item.title: Norway fund eyes southside homes
item.author: THE SUNDAY TIMES
item.description: Norges Bank Investment Management, a $2 trillion Norwegian sovereign wealth fund, is preparing to make its first property investment in Ireland. The fund is the frontrunner to buy the Euro200 million Cheevers Court and Haliday House apartment development in Dun Laoghaire. DWS, a subsidiary of Deutsche Bank, put the 368 apartments on the market in February. Norges is thought to be among the final bidders for the development.
